steps.description: Parallel scan lineitem (l_orderkey, l_quantity); aggregate SUM(l_quantity) per orderkey into shared hash map; extract qualifying_orderkeys where sum > 300
steps.output: qualifying_orderkeys: flat hash set (int32_t), ~2400 entries, capacity=next_power_of_2(2400*2)=4096

steps.description: Index nested-loop: probe orders_orderkey_hash.bin with ~2400 qualifying orderkeys; collect order rows

index.slot_struct: { int32_t key; uint32_t offset; uint32_t count; }

steps.description: Index nested-loop: probe customer_custkey_hash.bin with ~2400 o_custkey values; retrieve c_name and c_custkey

index.slot_struct: { int32_t key; uint32_t offset; uint32_t count; }

steps.c_name_access: const char* name = c_name_data + (size_t)row_idx * 26; decode via std::string(name, strnlen(name, 26))

steps.description: Index nested-loop: probe lineitem_orderkey_hash.bin with ~2400 qualifying orderkeys; sum l_quantity per orderkey

index.slot_struct: { int32_t key; uint32_t offset; uint32_t count; }

steps.description: Assemble ~2400 result rows; partial sort for top 100
steps.note: std::partial_sort or std::nth_element + sort on ~2400 rows; O(n log k), k=100
steps.date_decode: use date_utils.h for o_orderdate epoch-days -> YYYY-MM-DD; requires gendb::init_date_tables() at main() start

data_structures.subquery_agg_map: shared open-addressing hash map, capacity=33554432, key=int32_t, val=double, sentinel=INT32_MIN (std::fill), bounded probing
data_structures.qualifying_orderkeys: open-addressing hash set, capacity=4096 (next_power_of_2(2400*2)), key=int32_t, sentinel=INT32_MIN
data_structures.orders_index: pre-built mmap hash index (orders_orderkey_hash.bin), zero build cost
data_structures.customer_index: pre-built mmap hash index (customer_custkey_hash.bin), zero build cost
data_structures.lineitem_index: pre-built mmap hash index (lineitem_orderkey_hash.bin), zero build cost
data_structures.result_buffer: std::vector of ~2400 result structs, partial_sort for top-100

parallelism.rationale: Index probes and assembly are O(2400) — sequential overhead negligible; parallelism reserved for 60M-row lineitem scan

indexes.purpose: join_lookup, avoid second full 60M-row lineitem scan

aggregation.subquery: hash_group_by on l_orderkey with SUM(l_quantity), shared atomic hash map, 33554432 slots
aggregation.outer_group_by: identity (each qualifying o_orderkey is unique in TPC-H orders), no explicit hash aggregation needed; map o_orderkey -> sum_qty from lineitem index probe

correctness_notes: C1/C11: call gendb::init_date_tables() at top of main(); decode o_orderdate with date_utils.h
C9: subquery hash map capacity = next_power_of_2(15000000 * 2) = 33554432; qualifying set capacity = 4096
C20: use std::fill(slots, slots+capacity, sentinel_slot) — NEVER memset for INT32_MIN sentinel
C24: all hash probes use bounded for-loop (probe < cap), not unbounded while
C15: outer GROUP BY key is o_orderkey (unique) — no composite key struct needed
l_quantity and o_totalprice are stored as native double — no DECIMAL scale factor conversion needed
